title: normalized_input
description: Output of InputController. The raw prompt preserved verbatim, plus metadata extracted before any transformation.

original_prompt.description: The exact prompt as submitted by the user. Never modified.

normalized.description: True once the prompt has been ingested and is ready for downstream nodes.

mode_hint.description: Optional. Explicit mode override declared by the user in the prompt (e.g. 'mode: strict').

target_style.description: Optional. Explicit target style declared by the user (e.g. 'target_style: claude').

open_questions.description: Ambiguities or missing fields noted during ingestion, forwarded to ClarificationController.

x-hard_rules: original_prompt must be the exact user input — no normalization, trimming, or modification
InputController runs before SensitiveDataDetector — it only ingests, it does not transform
mode_hint and target_style are extracted but not acted on here — ModeRouter acts on them
